metadata.title: Consistent Attachments and Links
metadata.description: Consistent Attachments and Links Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: - will delete the empty folder and its empty parent folders.
ast.target: - 将删除空文件夹及其空父文件夹。

ast.target: 如果设置为空，则包含所有笔记

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Exclude notes from the following paths
ast.target: 排除来自以下路径的笔记

ast.source: If the setting is empty, no notes are excluded
ast.target: 如果设置为空，则不排除任何笔记

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Exclude attachments from the following paths when

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: 命令时，排除来自以下路径的附件。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: If the setting is empty, no paths are excluded from attachment collecting.
ast.target: 如果设置为空，则不排除任何路径的附件收集。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Treat files with these extensions as attachments.
ast.target: 将具有这些扩展名的文件视为附件。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: linked files are not treated as attachments and are not moved with the note.
ast.target: 链接的文件不被视为附件，也不会随笔记移动。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: You can add custom extensions, e.g.
ast.target: 您可以添加自定义扩展名，例如

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Insert each extension on a new line.

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: setting. Without proper configuration it might lead to inconvenient attachment rearrangements or even data loss in your vault.
ast.target: 设置。如果没有正确配置，可能会导致保险库中附件的不便重新排列，甚至数据丢失。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: recommended to backup your vault before using the plugin.
ast.target: 在使用插件前备份您的保险库。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: about how to use the plugin.

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Using 'Consistent Attachments and Links' plugin without proper configuration might lead to inconvenient attachment rearrangements or even data loss in your vault.
ast.target: 在没有正确配置的情况下使用“一致附件与链接”插件，可能会导致保险库中附件的不便重新排列，甚至数据丢失。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Some of your plugin settings has been changed to their safe values.
ast.target: 您的一些插件设置已被更改为安全值。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: This warning will not appear again.

ast.name: error
ast.source: No Intl support, please use an Intl polyfill!
ast.target: 不支持 Intl，请使用 Intl polyfill！

ast.name: error
ast.source: Only canvas changes are supported for canvas files
ast.target: 仅支持对画布文件进行画布更改

ast.name: error
ast.source: Node text is not a string

ast.name: info
ast.source: 🌐 i18next is maintained with support from Locize — consider powering your project with managed localization (AI, CDN, integrations): https://locize.com 💙
ast.target: 🌐 i18next 的维护得到了 Locize 的支持 — 考虑使用托管本地化（AI、CDN、集成）为您的项目提供动力：https://locize.com 💙

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically move attachments when a note is relocated. This includes attachments located in the same folder or any of its subfolders.
ast.target: 当笔记被移动时，自动移动其附件。这包括位于同一文件夹或其任何子文件夹中的附件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically remove attachments that are no longer referenced in other notes when the note is deleted.
ast.target: 当笔记被删除时，自动移除不再被其他笔记引用的附件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically update links to attachments and other notes when moving notes or attachments.
ast.target: 移动笔记或附件时，自动更新指向附件和其他笔记的链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically delete attachments when moving a note if a file with the same name exists in the destination folder. If disabled, the file will be renamed and moved.
ast.target: 移动笔记时，如果目标文件夹中存在同名文件，则自动删除附件。如果禁用，文件将被重命名并移动。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When a note is renamed, its linked references are automatically updated. If this option is enabled, the text of backlinks to this note will also be modified.
ast.target: 当笔记被重命名时，其链接的引用会自动更新。如果启用此选项，指向此笔记的反向链接文本也将被修改。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the name of the file for the consistency report.
ast.target: 指定一致性报告的文件名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically collect attachments when the note is edited.
ast.target: 编辑笔记时自动收集附件。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Update backlink text on note rename
ast.target: 笔记重命名时更新反向链接文本

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 从附件收集中排除路径

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Instance method `debug.destroy()` is deprecated and no longer does anything. It will be removed in the next major version of `debug`.
ast.target: 实例方法 `debug.destroy()` 已弃用且不再执行任何操作。它将在 `debug` 的下一个主要版本中移除。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: accessing an object - but returnObjects options is not enabled!
ast.target: 正在访问一个对象 - 但未启用 returnObjects 选项！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Seems the loaded translations were in flat JSON format instead of nested. Either set keySeparator: false on init or make sure your translations are published in nested format.
ast.target: 似乎加载的翻译是扁平 JSON 格式，而不是嵌套格式。请在初始化时设置 keySeparator: false，或确保您的翻译以嵌套格式发布。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: This means something IS WRONG in your setup. You access the t function before i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage was done. Wait for the callback or Promise to resolve before accessing it!!!
ast.target: 这意味着您的设置中存在错误。您在 i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage 完成之前访问了 t 函数。请等待回调或 Promise 解析后再访问它！！！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: No backend was added via i18next.use. Will not load resources.
ast.target: 未通过 i18next.use 添加后端。将不会加载资源。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: no languageDetector is used and no lng is defined
ast.target: init: 未使用 languageDetector 且未定义 lng

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: i18next is already initialized. You should call init just once!
ast.target: init: i18next 已经初始化。您应该只调用一次 init！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: hasLoadedNamespace: i18n.languages were undefined or empty
ast.target: hasLoadedNamespace: i18n.languages 未定义或为空

ast.name: warn
ast.source: I18N was not initialized, initializing default obsidian-dev-utils translations
ast.target: I18N 未初始化，正在初始化默认的 obsidian-dev-utils 翻译

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [remark-wiki-link] Warning: please upgrade to remark 13 to use this plugin
ast.target: [remark-wiki-link] 警告：请升级到 remark 13 以使用此插件

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Can't move file. Source and destination path the same.
ast.target: 无法移动文件。源路径和目标路径相同。

ast.name: description
ast.source: only pasted images are renamed. Applies only when the PNG image content is pasted from the clipboard directly. Typically, for pasting screenshots.
ast.target: 仅重命名粘贴的图像。仅当 PNG 图像内容直接从剪贴板粘贴时适用。通常用于粘贴截图。

ast.target: 跳过该附件并继续处理下一个。

ast.name: description
ast.source: will delete the empty attachment folder.
ast.target: 将删除空的附件文件夹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: will delete the empty attachment folder and its empty parent folders.
ast.target: 将删除空的附件文件夹及其空的父文件夹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: will keep the empty attachment folder.
ast.target: 将保留空的附件文件夹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: copy the attachment to the new location for all notes.
ast.target: 为所有笔记将附件复制到新位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The smaller the quality, the greater the compression ratio.
ast.target: 质量值越小，压缩比越大。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whether to convert pasted images to JPEG. Applies only when the PNG image content is pasted from the clipboard directly. Typically, for pasting screenshots.
ast.target: 是否将粘贴的图像转换为 JPEG。仅当 PNG 图像内容直接从剪贴板粘贴时适用。通常用于粘贴截图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If enabled, when the note is deleted, its orphan attachments are deleted as well.
ast.target: 如果启用，当笔记被删除时，其孤立附件也将被删除。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whether to rename attachment folders when a note is renamed or moved.
ast.target: 当笔记被重命名或移动时，是否重命名附件文件夹。

ast.target: 您确定要将自定义令牌重置为示例自定义令牌吗？您的更改将会丢失。
